ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock (e.g., VTSMX) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* The sector the stock belongs to (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* The industry the stock belongs to (e.g., Software, Banking) */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* The market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* The date the stock was first listed on the market */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* The stock exchange where the stock is traded (e.g., NYSE, NASDAQ) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "closing_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each closing price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock the price belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the closing price */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" TEXT /* The trading volume on the given date */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* The adjusted closing price, which accounts for stock splits and dividends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_closing_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock the position belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the position */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of shares held in the position */,
  "cost_basis" REAL /* The average cost per share */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* The last time the position was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* The status of the position (e.g., active, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* The full name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* The phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last time the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The last time the role was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_stock_data, manage_users) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The last time the permission was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_stock_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the stock */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* The action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_stock_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_stock_access_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock the performance belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" TEXT /* The trading volume on the given date */,
  "volume_change" REAL /* The percentage change in volume compared to the previous day */,
  "volatility" REAL /* The volatility of the stock on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_performance_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trend */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., upward, downward) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  "impact" TEXT /* The impact of the trend (e.g., high, low) */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the trend information (e.g., news article, market report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)
